text_original: Stories are great. Investing in subscription is advisable to properly enjoy it. Note: No NSFW option. I wish it had, but it doesn't.
text_zh: 故事很棒。建议购买订阅以获得更好的体验。注意：没有 NSFW（成人内容）选项。我希望它有，但事实并非如此。
reply_original: Thank you for your support and for recommending our subscription! We are thrilled you enjoy the stories. Regarding NSFW content, we must follow Google Play policies to keep the app available. However, our team is always working to enhance the storytelling depth. If you have more suggestions, please email us at support@fantachat.ai!
reply_zh: 感谢您的支持以及对我们订阅服务的推荐！我们很高兴您喜欢这些故事。关于 NSFW 内容，为了确保应用能正常上架，我们必须遵守 Google Play 的政策。不过，我们的团队一直在努力提升故事叙述的深度。如果您有更多建议，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们！
